skills.name: explain-codebase
skills.description: Answer "what does this do?" for a codebase, directory, or file. Produces a concise inline explanation without writing a documentation file.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: map-api-flow
skills.description: Map the full API call chain from frontend UI components through the API layer, across the network boundary, to backend controllers and services. Produces a Mermaid.js diagram and a bullet-point summary of critical data flow paths.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: research-codebase
skills.description: Research and produce comprehensive documentation for a codebase from a GitHub URL or local path.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: review-code
skills.description: Perform a structured code review of a file or function, covering correctness, security, readability, edge cases, and test coverage.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: summarise-pr
skills.description: Summarise a GitHub pull request — its purpose, key changes, and review considerations — given a URL or owner/repo#number reference.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: write-tests
skills.description: Generate tests for a specified file, function, or class. Matches the project's existing test framework, style, and conventions.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: design-system
skills.description: Convert a requirement or business goal into a reference architecture with C4 diagrams, component boundaries, trade-offs, NFRs, and risks.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: write-adr
skills.description: Generate an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) for a technical choice, capturing context, decision, alternatives considered, and consequences.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: perf-investigate
skills.description: Diagnose performance bottlenecks in a system or codebase — latency, CPU, memory, or throughput — and produce a latency tree, suspect list, cache opportunities, and a concrete profiling plan.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: refactor-strategy
skills.description: Produce a large-scale refactoring or modernization roadmap with incremental migration phases, blast radius analysis, rollback plan, and risk register.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: threat-model
skills.description: Apply STRIDE threat modelling to a system, component, or architecture description to identify threat vectors, trust boundaries, abuse cases, and mitigations.
skills.author: fabianmagrini
